Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 2}-chan. We were just talking about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}We've been feeling a bit guilty for troubling you about the persimmon tree...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 6 5 103}Ohh, good one! "I 'wooden' worry about it"? Glad you can joke around even at a time like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Makes me feel like we're not so different, you and I. Lord knows I can't pass up a good pun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Did you forget? The persimmon tree. It serves as an important connection between us, you know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You must have a lot on your mind, don't you? It's not because you don't care about us... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That persimmon tree is... is a reminder of our son.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Actually... before his death, he was a teacher at Gekkoukan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}He planted that tree on graduation day with the students of his very first class.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Just when we thought that tree was about to bear fruit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Why now? Why do they want to cut it down now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm all right now. That made me feel a lot better. It's very comforting talking to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, wow! You've really gone and captured my wife's heart![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You must be popular with the ladies! My wife's no sucker, after all![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I feel I'm looking at myself when I was in my prime![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The elderly couple seems[n]to have grown fond of me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Don't fret too much about the tree. Just stop by when you have the chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh, and take this. It's left over from earlier, but it's still good...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bunkichi-san stuffed a leftover[n]bread into my pocket.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Well then, you take care of yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with the elderly couple[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
